title: field name size
text: field name size Specify the maximum size of field names. USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = field name size : FieldNameSize USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = fldnmsize : FieldNameSize Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax DB2 connector DB2 USYS$DB2_PARAMS ODBC connector ODx USYS$ODx_PARAMS There are no restrictions on use. Description Use the field name size option to specify the maximum size, in number of characters, allowed for field names. When specified, the connector truncates field names to the specified size. The minimum size is 8 ; if a lower value is specified, no truncation occurs. USYS$DB2_PARAMS field name size : 18 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
